message:

+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opencost deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opencost version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nhelm list -n opencost 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opencost installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opencost configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opencost configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get configmap -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opencost\n```\nHello! \n\nI'm wondering if you're open to contributions, I'd like to add Scaleway as a provider. If it's ok I'll start the implementation 😄"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support Scaleway Kubernetes",
+        "description": "## What does this PR change?\n* Adds Scaleway as a provider\n\n## Does this PR relate to any other PRs?\n* no\n\n## How will this PR impact users?\n* New provider available\n\n## Does this PR address any GitHub or Zendesk issues?\n* Closes #560 \n\n## How was this PR tested?\n* \n\n## Does this PR require changes to documentation?\n* Most likely\n\n## Have you labeled this PR and its corresponding Issue as \"next release\" if it should be part of the next Kubecost release? If not, why not?\n\nThis is a first draft\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get events -n opencost --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support Scaleway Kubernetes\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
